title: The S2 organs and Eva Unit 1 becoming a God
display_title: The S2 organs and Eva Unit 1 becoming a God
wikitext:
[]: The S2 organs and Eva Unit 1 becoming a God             Quote Post by ApolloIVtv » Mon May 05, 2014 11:38 pm One part I'm still sort of confused about is when Eva Unit 1 absorbs the S2 organ from Zeruel. They were trying to create an artificial S2 organ in America, which fails and creates the sea of dirac, but the data remained, so that means that they want to make it and eventually will make it. They want an Eva with an S2 organ, with gives it the power of inexhaustible energy, and Seele wants it too (That's what I believe at least, because they use the MPEvas in EoE). But when Eva Unit 1 absorbs the S2 organ, Seele gets all angry and frustrated, saying "Man must not create gods!" and "Creating a God was not on our agenda". And there's even more contradiction when Ritsuko's speech during the end of ep 23, because she says "Man tried to obtain a God, Adam, but failed, so they tried to copy a God instead, which was Eva", so it's pretty obvious that they wanted something close enough on Adam's level, which is Eva 1. And plus, doesn't Seele need Eva 1 with the organ to perform instrumentality in ep 25'? I guess you could argue that, once Eva 1 got the organ, Seele compromised and used Eva 1's power at their advantage for instrumentality and changed their plans, and you could say that, even though they were planning to make S2 organs, they weren't really planning to make the Evas "godlike", just have the energy advantage, and when Eva unit 1 ate the organ it "somehow" made it into a God (sure, whatever). Maybe it's because Unit 1 is a lillith offspring and an Angel an Adam offspring so it turned into this poweful "abomination" kind of God (which makes sense due to Unit 1's imagery in the beginning of ep 20), but didn't they want a powerful being at their disposal anyway? I don't know, maybe you Eva veterans could help me out, unless it's one of those "it just is" and "your own interpretation" kind of thing that Anno gives us, sigh.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon May 05, 2014 11:51 pm ^ Important difference: Eva 04, and the Mp EVAs were all Adam-based Evas (as Ritsuko explains.) Eva 01 alone (as explained in EoE) is copied from Lillith, so it would have both the fruit of Life AND the fruit of knowledge, which equals godly hax in the EVA-verse, while a mp eva with a full-fledged S-2 Engine would have only the fruit of life. What also peeved SEELE is that this "god" is right where Gendo and Yui can do with it whatever they want. (and SEELE doesn't.)

[]:             Quote Post by Dougurasu » Tue May 06, 2014 7:32 am The MP EVAs being Adam-based sort of makes sense as well as they look really different from the other Eva's... Eva-04 artwork also looks quite a bit like the MP EVA's, but also a lot like Eva's 00 to 03. Did EoE really stress that Eva 01 is the ONLY Eva based on Lilith? What are the other Eva's based on then? What were they created from? Eva-00 based on ??? Eva-01 based on Lilith (steals S2 engine/fruite of life) Eva-02 based on ??? Eva-03 based on ??? Eva-04 based on Adam (with S2 engine/fruit of life) Eva-05 through 13 based on Adam (with S2 engine/fruit of life and Kaworu dummy system) It would be weird if the other Evangelions were based on Adam, because they all have umbilical cables for energy (you don't need one once you have an S2 engine as shown by the MP EVA's).

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 06, 2014 8:23 am ^ All the others Evas are clones of ADAM, EVA-01 is the only exception : it was made directly from the flesh of Lilith (and not cloned), which is why it lacked its lower body.

[]:             Quote Post by Dougurasu » Tue May 06, 2014 8:27 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ All the others Evas are clones of ADAM, EVA-01 is the only exception : it was made directly from the flesh of Lilith (and not cloned), which is why it lacked its lower body.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 06, 2014 8:42 am ^ Rei has Lilith's soul, but the forbidden union is a physical one, ADAM's flesh and Lilith's flesh, or else Kaworu would be a walking Third Impact since he had ADAM's soul and is in a Lilin body. Which is why Rei can pilot EV-00 without problems (and part of her soul inside EVA-00 if theories about it are true) Which raises the question of how is it that the Angels don't try to start Third Impact with EV-01... As for the others Evas, they are clones, meaning imperfect copies, instead of natural offspring or the genuine deal, that's why they don't have an S² Engine, which has to be generated and grafted later.

[]:             Quote Post by Dougurasu » Tue May 06, 2014 8:50 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ Rei has Lilith's soul, but the forbidden union is a physical one, ADAM's flesh and Lilith's flesh, or else Kaworu would be a walking Third Impact since he had ADAM's soul and is in a Lilin body. Which is why Rei can pilot EV-00 without problems (and part of her soul inside EVA-00 if theories about it are true) Which raises the question of how is it that the Angels don't try to start Third Impact with EV-01... As for the others Evas, they are clones, meaning imperfect copies, instead of natural offspring or the genuine deal, that's why they don't have an S² Engine, which has to be generated and grafted later.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 06, 2014 9:43 am ElMariachi wrote: ^ Which raises the question of how is it that the Angels don't try to start Third Impact with EV-01...

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue May 06, 2014 1:56 pm ElMariachi wrote: ^ Rei has Lilith's soul, but the forbidden union is a physical one, ADAM's flesh and Lilith's flesh, or else Kaworu would be a walking Third Impact since he had ADAM's soul and is in a Lilin body. Which is why Rei can pilot EV-00 without problems (and part of her soul inside EVA-00 if theories about it are true) Which raises the question of how is it that the Angels don't try to start Third Impact with EV-01...

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 06, 2014 3:36 pm ^ But in EoE SEELE intended to use EVA-01 and the Harpies to trigger Third Impact, yet neither Lilith or ADAM's soul were involved. Unless EVA-01 acquiring a S2 Engine made it a viable medium for it?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue May 06, 2014 4:04 pm ElMariachi wrote: ^ But in EoE SEELE intended to use EVA-01 and the Harpies to trigger Third Impact, yet neither Lilith or ADAM's soul were involved. Unless EVA-01 acquiring a S2 Engine made it a viable medium for it?
